title: Cequence AI Gateway
description: The Cequence AI Gateway unlocks the promise of agentic AI productivity by easily and safely connecting agents to enterprise and SaaS applications.

items: Enforce zero-trust policies between agents, tools, & external APIs, Apply & manage runtime Guardrails
Enable human-in-the-loop (HITL) override thresholds on high-risk or ambiguous actions, Runtime guardrails & moderation; anomalous tool use
Correlate telemetry from agent step tracing, tool execution, & message logs.
Alert on anomalies;  e.g., goal reversal, unexpected plan depth, adversarial-input, excessive tool usage, or rapid inter-agent chatter.
Enforce zero-trust policies between agents, tools, & external APIs, Apply & manage runtime Guardrails
Enforce role- & task-based access policies across agent populations & their tool access.
